primary: Clean git pull
reason:
Why: Command failed: git pull --rebase --autostash
error: Pulling is not possible because you have unmerged files.
hint: Fix them up in the work tree, and then use 'git add/rm <file>'
hint: as appropriate to mark resolution and make a commit.
fatal: Exiting because of an unresolved conflict.
impact: Conflicts may not auto-resolve correctly

primary: SQLite-backed conversational memory with summaries and FTS5 search
fallback: JSONL-based last 20 messages (no summaries, no search)
reason: TopicMemory init failed: spawnSync /bin/sh ENOENT
impact: Sessions start without conversation summaries. Search unavailable. Context limited to last 20 raw messages.

primary: SQLite-backed knowledge graph with FTS5 + vector hybrid search
reason:
SemanticMemory init failed: The module '/Users/justin/Documents/Projects/sagemind/.instar/shadow-install/node_modules/better-sqlite3/build/Release/better_sqlite3.node'
was compiled against a different Node.js version using
NODE_MODULE_VERSION 127. This version of Node.js requires
NODE_MODULE_VERSION 141. Please try re-compiling or re-installing
the module (for instance, using `npm rebuild` or `npm install`).
impact: Knowledge graph unavailable. Migration, semantic search, and entity-relationship queries disabled.

primary: Inject Telegram message into tmux session
fallback: Message lost — user input never reaches Claude
reason:
Failed to inject message: Command failed: /opt/homebrew/bin/tmux send-keys -t =topic-748: [200~
can't find session: topic-748
impact: User message silently dropped
